reviews.text:
As we proudly show our wedding and honeymoon photos to family and friends, we often here some variation of “oh my God, those are the most beautiful wedding photos I have ever seen!”  (And we're pretty sure this isn't people just being polite...)  From intimate tears to grand mountain vistas, Nathan produced exquisite visions we’ll cherish forever.

Nathan is so attentive to what you want, and willing to do anything (climb a tree, climb a mountain, risk getting blown off a ridge, lie down in mud, lie down in the middle of a road – he did all of these for us) to capture the beauty and emotion of each moment.  When we had some unexpected extra time before our ceremony in Rocky Mountain National Park, we climbed a nearby peak with him (in gown and suit) and not only captured some amazing photos, but made some great unexpected adventure memories.

We asked Nathan to blend in with our family and friends (“be one of the crew”) and document what he saw for the day, and that’s exactly what he did.  Unlike some photographers, spending time with Nathan was a pleasure -- he’s intelligent, witty, adventurous, and laid back.  Our friends and family enjoyed having Nathan around, too.

We couldn’t be happier with our choice of a photographer to record our happy day.  Whether you’re getting married in Colorado or on the other side of the planet, hire Nathan. Your beautiful photographs will forever remind you of the great choice you made.  -Eric & Erica

Nathan perfectly captured mine and Kelly's love for each other during the surprise proposal and also the next day during our engagement photo session. He was very specific in where he wanted to photos for the absolute spectacular back drop of Estes Park in the fall. The photos are breathtaking. Thank you so very much Nathan for being a part of it all.

Nathan Welton was by far the best money that my husband and I spent on our wedding! He was absolutely amazing! Nathan was professional, fun, easy going, and for meeting him for the first time ever on the day of our wedding, made both my husband and myself feel like we have known him forever. Our pictures are so stunning that the words cannot describe. They are breathe taking! I would recommend Dreamtime Images to anyone looking for the best photographer!

Dreamtime Images (Nathan) made our day an incredible experience. From helping us find the perfect spot to being an impromptu shuttle driver, he was like another member of our family, just lending a hand and willing to go above and beyond to make the day special! His professionalism and terrific attitude made our day effortless and even more special.

Of course, his photography is A-M-A-Z-I-N-G! Your photos will be just as breathtaking as the ones on his website and he will do whatever and go wherever he needs to get the shot! When I saw our proofs, I got wedding day goosebumps and tears all over again. He captured all the joy, all the tears, all the laughter, and all of our wedding day bliss!

I found Dreamtime Images when I was browsing the internet looking for wedding venues in Colorado. His website is a great resource for elopements and micro weddings, with recommendations and details on each area in Colorado.

Throughout the planning process, Nathan was a wealth of knowledge, a great communicator, and very responsive. We even had to move our wedding day up by a day for weather purposes and he was able to accommodate  us.

So in case you haven't guessed it by now, we would recommend Dreamtime Images hands down! Thank you sincerely from the bottom of our hearts! We'll be back to take family and anniversary photos!

Nathan was absolutely fantastic to work with.  He went above and beyond to make sure everyone at our wedding felt comfortable during pictures.  He took some of the most amazing pictures and truly captured what I would consider to be a perfect day!  His knowledge of Estes Park allowed us to take gorgeous pictures in some very unique locations.  Even after the wedding Nathan was available to us and kept in great contact until our pictures and album were completed and in our hands.  Overall we had a wonderful experience with Nathan and Dreamtime Images, I would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a unique eye and a very talented photographer!
